title: Sumerian/Akkadian: The Farmer's Instructions
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: The Farmer's Instructions.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: The Farmer's Instructions.

translation.text: From 'The Farmer's Instructions': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
